name: Election to Treat Timber Cutting as Sale

eligibility.description: Must have owned the timber or held a contract right to cut for more than 1 year; election is binding for future years unless revoked with consent.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to treat the cutting of timber as a sale or exchange, potentially allowing the gain to be taxed at preferential capital gains rates rather than ordinary income rates.
